databaseChooser.description: Choose an existing database or create a new one. You can remember frequently used databases for quick access.
databaseChooser.descriptionServer: Set up a connection to a database and create a new one, or quickly open an existing database from your recent list using saved connection settings.
databaseChooser.descriptionWeb: Create a new database, or open an existing one from your recently used list for quick access.
databaseChooser.localDesc: Data is stored locally on your device (SQLite). No internet required.
databaseChooser.serverDesc: Data is stored on a server (PostgreSQL). Requires an internet connection if the server is remote.
databaseChooser.title: Open or create a database
databaseChooser.titleServer: Set up connection and create a database

error.databaseIsBusy: Cannot recreate database file because it is currently in use

error.headerRowEmpty: Header row is empty or missing
error.invalidConstraintCheck: Record violates a database check constraint.
error.invalidConstraintForeign: Record is being used as reference.
error.invalidConstraintNotNull: Record violates a NOT NULL constraint.
error.rateLimiter: Too many requests. Please slow down

descriptions.about: Learn more about this app, its features.
descriptions.buyMeCoffee: Invoice Builder is maintained by a single developer. Your support keeps updates coming and new features rolling out! Be one of the first supporters and see your name in the app
descriptions.customizeInvoice: Invoice number prefix e.g.: INV, suffix.
descriptions.darkMode: Switch between light and dark themes.
descriptions.export: Export your data for backup or to use in other applications.
descriptions.import: Import your data from other sources or backup files.
descriptions.privacyPolicy: Feel free to go through our privacy policy.
descriptions.share: Share this app with your friends.
descriptions.support: Report bugs or suggest improvements via GitHub.
descriptions.turnPresets: Enable or disable the presets feature
descriptions.turnQuotes: Enable or disable quote creation feature
descriptions.turnStyleProfiles: Enable or disable style profile feature
descriptions.tutorial: Checkout guide on how to use application
descriptions.wallOfFame: View the supporters who have contributed to the app
